name: long-context-synthetic-v0

stages.name: architecture-validation
stages.description: Validate controlled long-context tasks designed to trigger compaction and persistence behavior.

stages.name: behavior-pilot

notes: Supply --dataset-jsonl with synthetic tasks normalized into the repo-patch schema.
This preset is meant to isolate compaction continuity and externalized coordination behavior under controlled conditions.
